lineup_source: Portugal vs DR Congo, World Cup group stage, 17 June 2026 (4-2-3-1)

players.name: Diogo Costa
players.note: Born in Rothrist, Switzerland, to Portuguese emigrant parents Francisco Costa and Armanda Meireles; moved to Santo Tirso, Portugal, aged 7.

players.name: João Cancelo
players.note: Born in Barreiro, Portugal, to parents Jose and Filomena Cancelo; no documented foreign heritage.

players.name: Tomás Araújo
players.note: Born in Portugal; parents' origins not documented, assumed Portuguese.

players.name: Renato Veiga
players.note: Born in Lisbon; son of former Cape Verde international footballer Nélson Veiga, raised partly in Cyprus and Morocco during his father's career; mother Tânia Leiria Palma is Portuguese.

players.name: Nuno Mendes
players.note: Born in Sintra, Portugal, of explicitly stated Cape Verdean descent through his family.

players.name: João Neves
players.note: Born in Tavira, Portugal; father a police officer/coach, mother a PE teacher, both Portuguese with no documented foreign heritage.

players.name: Vitinha
players.note: Born in Vila das Aves, Portugal; son of former footballer Vítor Manuel Ferreira and Ana Maria, both Portuguese.

players.name: Bernardo Silva
players.note: Born in Lisbon to Paulo Silva and Maria João Mota Veiga, both explicitly described as Portuguese.

players.name: Bruno Fernandes
players.note: Born in Maia, Portugal, to José Fernandes and Virgínia/Cristina Borges, both ethnically Portuguese from the Porto area.

players.name: Pedro Neto
players.note: Born in Viana do Castelo, Portugal; father Pedro Neto Sr. is Portuguese, mother Cristina Lomba is of Mozambican descent.

players.name: Cristiano Ronaldo
players.note: Born in Funchal, Madeira, to José Dinis Aveiro and Maria Dolores dos Santos Aveiro, both from Madeira; a great-grandmother's Cape Verdean origin is too distant to count.
